title: Tier 2 modular split — calc, dom, storage, modals, charts, orchestrator app
summary: Split bostadskalkyl.html into calc.js, dom.js, storage.js, modals.js, charts.js, app.js with async boot, App.recalc rename, versioned storage keys, and removal of all inline event handlers; fix bare renderAmortChart() call to App.charts.renderAmortChart()
